entities.name: comment
entities.context: CLI command for adding threaded comments to outputs with optional author, context, parent, and tags

entities.name: improve
entities.context: CLI command for updating structured improvement notes without changing review status

entities.name: export
entities.context: CLI command for exporting filtered reviews as JSON with status and sentiment filters

entities.name: improvement_notes
entities.context: Structured review field containing what_to_change, optimal_state, and priority

entities.name: provenance
entities.context: Tracking mechanism capturing conversation, thread, script, and pipeline origin

entities.name: review statuses
entities.context: Valid states: pending, in_review, approved, issue, training, archived

entities.name: review sentiments
entities.context: Quality ratings: excellent, good, acceptable, issue

relationships.context: The improve command updates the improvement_notes field on outputs
Export can filter by status values
Export can filter by sentiment values
Both are metadata fields captured during review process
